questionHtml: Distinguish between plants grown in long days and short days in the mean number of leaves per rosette during the experimental period.
markschemeHtml:
a. rosette of plant grown in long day has fewer leaves. Accept vice versa.

b. rosette leaf number of plant grown in long day plateaus/stays constant while the number continues to increase for plants grown in short days. OWTTE.

meta.title: Distinguish between plants grown in long days and short days in the mean number of leaves per rosette during the experimental period.
